_comment: PRISM Games Library — Add games to the 'games' array below.

_schema.title: Display name shown on the card
_schema.description: Short one-line description shown on hover
_schema.category: One of: Action | Adventure | Puzzle | Racing | Sports | Shooter | Arcade | Strategy | Horror | Multiplayer
_schema.tags: Array of extra filter tags, e.g. ['2D', 'Fast-paced']
_schema.thumbnail: URL or relative path to a 200x200 image. Use '' for auto-generated placeholder.
_schema.url: The proxied iframe URL the game loads from
_schema.featured: true = shown in the Featured row at the top
_schema.new: true = shows a NEW badge on the card
_schema.hot: true = shows a HOT badge on the card
_schema.color: Accent hex color used for the card glow (optional, falls back to gold)

games.title: Slioe
games.description: Replace this entry with a real game.
